sentences.translationEn: Morning exercise gives energy to the body.

sentences.arabic: مَشَيْتُ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ لِمُدَّةِ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam šetao u parku pola sata.
sentences.translationEn: I walked in the park for half an hour yesterday.

sentences.arabic: الْجَرْيُ يُقَوِّي الْقَلْبَ وَيُحَسِّنُ النَّشَاطَ الْبَدَنِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Trčanje jača srce i poboljšava fizičku aktivnost.
sentences.translationEn: Running strengthens the heart and improves physical activity.
